inputs.label: Reference Value
inputs.businessContext: Optimal theoretical value; if >0, percent error is calculated instead of percent difference

businessContext_i18n.en: Optimal theoretical value; if >0, percent error is calculated instead of percent difference
businessContext_i18n.tr: Optimal teorik değer; >0 ise yüzde fark yerine yüzde hata hesaplanır
businessContext_i18n.de: Optimaler theoretischer Wert; wenn >0, wird die prozentuale Abweichung anstelle der prozentualen Differenz berechnet
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur théorique optimale ; si >0, l'erreur en pourcentage est calculée au lieu de la différence en pourcentage
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor teórico óptimo; si >0, se calcula el error porcentual en lugar de la diferencia porcentual
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة النظرية المثلى؛ إذا كانت >0، يتم حساب نسبة الخطأ بدلاً من نسبة الفرق

inputs.label: Tolerance Threshold
inputs.businessContext: Maximum acceptable percent deviation before flagging a quality issue

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum acceptable percent deviation before flagging a quality issue
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalite sorununu işaretlemeden önce izin verilen maksimum yüzde sapma
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximal akzeptable prozentuale Abweichung, bevor ein Qualitätsproblem gemeldet wird
businessContext_i18n.fr: Écart maximal acceptable en pourcentage avant de signaler un problème de qualité
businessContext_i18n.es: Desviación porcentual máxima aceptable antes de marcar un problema de calidad
businessContext_i18n.ar: أقصى انحراف مئوي مقبول قبل الإبلاغ عن مشكلة جودة
